title: Rubber Glue 30g, Strong Flexible Adhesive for Rubber, Plastic, Leather, and Vinyl – Waterproof, Heat Resistant, and Long-Lasting Bond for Daily Repairs and DIY Projects (XJJSUK01)
features: Super Strong Adhesion:This rubber glue features an ultra-strong, flexible bond that won’t crack or turn brittle over time. Once cured, it creates a durable connection with excellent heat and pressure resistance, keeping repairs firm and long-lasting.

Fast-Drying & Waterproof: The glue dries within 10–45 seconds and fully cures in 24 hours, offering quick and efficient bonding. Its waterproof formula ensures stable performance in humid or wet conditions, perfect for both indoor and outdoor applications.

Wide Applications: This versatile rubber adhesive works effectively on rubber, plastic, leather, metal, and more. Ideal for various repair and crafting needs, it forms a strong and seamless bond even on rough or vertical surfaces.

Easy & Precise Application: Simply clean and dry the surfaces, apply a small amount of glue, and press for a few seconds. Each pack includes precision droppers for accurate, mess-free application — perfect for detailed or hard-to-reach areas.

Reliable Customer Support: We are committed to providing a worry-free experience. If you have any concerns about the rubber glue, contact us anytime — fast replacement, refund, or assistance will be provided with care.
description: Nexkayee rubber glue adopts a professional adhesive formula with powerful and long-lasting adhesion, and it is heat-resistant and waterproof, making it the perfect solution for repairing damaged rubber items. This glue for rubber is easy to operate and dries quickly in seconds, which allows you to easily and effectively repair damaged rubber items without waiting for a long time. The instant glue for rubber to rubber has a wide range of uses and can be applied to bond tires, boots, belts, DIY crafts, toys, rubber edges, rubber tubes and other rubber products, which can basically meet your home repair needs. The rubber glue adhesive considerately features an anti-clogging design, and there is a small steel stud on the inside of the bottle cap, which can effectively prevent the glue from being unusable due to the blockage. 30g super glue for rubber can save you a lot of repair or replacement costs, truly achieving value for money. Product Application: This glue for rubber can be widely used in bonding tires, boots, belts, DIY crafts, toys, rubber edges, rubber tubes and other rubber products. The super glue for rubber is also suitable for bonding rubber to rubber and rubber to other materials, such as rubber to plastic and rubber to metal. In addition, the rubber glue adhesive can also be applied to all kinds of uneven, rough and vertical surfaces. The product includes: 30g rubber adhesive*1 Droppers*3: used for fine application. How to Use: 1. Clean and dry the surfaces to be bonded. 2. Apply an appropriate amount of rubber glue on one of the surfaces. 3. Press the two surfaces together firmly for 10-45 seconds. 4. Wait for 24 hours to achieve the best bonding effect. Cautions: 1. Before use, please strictly follow the instructions to avoid affecting the rubber glue effect due to improper use. 2. Please use the rubber adhesive in a ventilated area and keep away from fireworks. 3. Please be careful not to contact the skin and eyes when using the glue for rubber. In case of contact, rinse with plenty of water and consult a doctor in time. 4. After use, please clean the rubber to rubber glue residue at the bottle mouth in time and close the bottle cap tightly to prevent the rubber adhesive from solidifying after long-term contact with air. 5. Please store the heavy duty glue for rubber to rubber in a cool and dry place. At the same time, please keep out of reach of children to avoid accidental ingestion.
